title: pinus montezumae subsp. macrocarpa
intro: Pinus montezumae subsp. macrocarpa, also known as the Montezuma pine, is a species of pine tree native to Mexico. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The resin and essential oils extracted from the Montezuma pine have been found to have medicinal properties that can aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and combat infections. Herbal preparations of the Montezuma pine, such as essential oils and extracts, are used to promote respiratory health, reduce stress, and support immune function.
